name: 26 Albemarle Street
description: Luxury redevelopment in Mayfair — restoration of a historic facade with a Revit-based BIM solution using point cloud scans, technical documentation, and construction support.

name: 22 Harley Street
description: Heritage-listed healthcare refurbishment — BIM coordination, point cloud capture, bespoke Revit families, and coordinated documentation for a premium private medical environment.

name: Covent Garden Market
description: BIM delivery for a heritage market refurbishment — architectural, structural, and point cloud layers federated for a complex existing building in central London.

name: Brewer Street
description: Mixed-use redevelopment in Soho — 3D Revit models, heritage facade retention, and coordination with structural and MEP consultants through construction documentation.

name: Rectory Gardens School
description: Adaptive redevelopment of a former school site — Revit models, BIM deliverables, and comparative elevation analysis for a sensitive urban context.

name: Storebox Lockup Units
description: Digital documentation of existing storage facilities — federated 3D Revit models and coordinated 2D plans, sections, and elevations for lockup units across the portfolio.
